#3 CHAITIN--JT RESUMES. ALL PRESENT. VERDICT FOR DEFTS READ JURY THANKED AND EXCUSED, COURT TO PREPARE JUDGMENT IN VIEW OF LENGTH OF VERDICT, SEE VERDICT IN FILE AT LENGTH. COURT RETAINS EXHIBITS WHICH ARE IN EVIDENCE. COURT ADJOURNS.
